content:
Let me analyze the task: 1. This is stage web-002-backlink (Order: 2) 2. The goal is to create webpage 2 and link it back to page 1 without breaking page 1 3. I need to create site/page-2.html 4. The validators are: - page-2-links-index: failure_class=link_integrity - all-html-parse: failure_class=syntax Looking at the requirements: - page-2.html: title text must include 'Entropy Page 2'; backlink href must be 'index.html' So I need to create page-2.html that: 1. Has a title with 'Entropy Page 2' 2. Has a link back to index.html (the backlink) The existing index.html already exists and has: - Title: Entropy Page 1 - data-entropy-shared-table="factory-links" on the nav I should NOT modify index.html (the task says "without breaking page 1"). I just need to create page-2.html with: - - Title containing 'Entropy Page 2' - A backlink to index.html Let me create the page-2.html file: { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": "\n\n\n \n \n Entropy Page 2\n\n\n
\n Back to Entropy Page 1\n
\n
\n

Welcome to Entropy Page 2

\n

This is the second page in the chain.

\n
\n\n" } ], "notes": "Created page-2.html with title containing 'Entropy Page 2' and backlink href pointing to 'index.html'." }
